channel.title: Jose Fresco Blog
channel.description: Insights and reflections on building web applications, browser extensions, and automation tools

item.title: Running Family Dashboard: From Clone to Kitchen Wall in One Afternoon
item.description: A complete setup guide for Family Dashboard — cloning the repo, configuring OpenWeather and CalDAV credentials, deploying the Vercel serverless proxy, and getting it running as a full-screen kiosk on an iPad.

item.title: Family Dashboard v3.30: Writing My Own Weather One-Liners
item.description: How I overhauled the Family Dashboard weather narrative engine in v3.30 — replacing 156 borrowed comedian-style quips with 56 original one-liners, and what the modular architecture from v3.26 made that painless.

item.title: Building the JF Notify Marketing Site with Eleventy
item.description: How I built the jfnotify.com marketing site using Eleventy (11ty), Nunjucks templating, and a serverless contact function — a static-first approach to giving a WordPress plugin its own proper home on the web.

item.title: WPE Central Command Helper: The WordPress Plugin That Closes the WP Engine API Gap
item.description: A deep-dive into wpe-central-command-helper — the PHP WordPress plugin that exposes WordPress-level data the WP Engine API can't provide, powering the WPE Central Command fleet dashboard with core version, pending updates, active plugins, maintenance mode state, and upload directory size through a single secured REST endpoint.

item.title: JF Website Monitor: How Content Change Detection Works Under the Hood
item.description: A technical deep-dive into how JF Website Monitor's content change detection engine works — from HTML normalization and SHA-256 fingerprinting to CSS selector targeting and alert cooldowns that prevent notification fatigue.

item.title: Raspberry Pi Agent: A Python Command Dispatcher for Pi Automation
item.description: How I built a Python-based command dispatcher that unifies shell execution, service checks, log tailing, and system stats across my entire Pi automation stack — the backend layer behind Arpy Assist, the Telegram bot, and Pi Backups.

item.title: Who Dis: Building a Right-Click IP Lookup Chrome Extension
item.description: How I built Who Dis — a lightweight Chrome Manifest V3 extension that puts instant IP geolocation, ASN, and ISP data one right-click away. No new tab, no copy-paste, no context switch.

item.title: WPE Central Command: A Custom Dashboard for Managing Multiple WP Engine Sites
item.description: How I built WPE Central Command — a custom JavaScript dashboard with a PHP helper plugin for managing multiple WP Engine WordPress sites from one place, with bulk operations and at-a-glance health monitoring.

item.title: Pi Backups: Automating Offsite Backups for Raspberry Pi Applications
item.description: How I built a shell script system to automatically back up all my Raspberry Pi application data offsite — eliminating the SD card single-point-of-failure with rsync, SSH, and cron.

item.title: SafeShare: Clean Reddit Post Sharing with One-Click Bookmarklet
item.description: Introducing SafeShare — a clean reader view for Reddit posts with a one-click bookmarklet. No login walls, no app install prompts, just shareable links.
